name: sas-score-mcp-serverjs
description: Skills, agent, and MCP server for reading and scoring data via SAS Viya

VIYA_SERVER.title: SAS Viya server URL
VIYA_SERVER.description: Base URL of your SAS Viya server, e.g. https://my-viya.example.com

AUTHFLOW.title: Auth flow
AUTHFLOW.description: Authentication flow: oauth, code, sascli, token, or bearer

CLIENTID.title: OAuth client ID
CLIENTID.description: OAuth client ID registered on the Viya server
